description: Documentation and reference service contract v1 — 8 operations for searching, browsing, and retrieving developer documentation, API references, package registries, and knowledge bases. Read-only by design. Covers NixOS, Apple Developer, language docs, and similar reference MCPs.

operations.description: Full-text search across the documentation corpus — returns ranked results with titles, summaries, and identifiers
operations.name: search

operations.description: Get detailed content for a specific item — API page, package detail, option definition, or article
operations.name: info

operations.description: List categories, topics, technologies, or taxonomy — hierarchical navigation of the documentation structure
operations.name: browse

operations.description: Version history, updates, changelogs, or release notes — track changes over time
operations.name: versions

operations.description: Resolve cross-references between items — batch link resolution, dependency graphs, or related-item lookups
operations.name: references

operations.description: Sample code, working examples, or implementation patterns from the documentation source
operations.name: samples

operations.description: Platform, version, or environment compatibility information for a specific item
operations.name: compatibility

operations.description: Find related, similar, or alternative items — recommendations, see-also, or functional equivalents
operations.name: related

title: documentation-v1
